shortDescription: Friendly confirmation with arrival info teased.
whenToUse: Send within 1 hour of receiving the booking. Sets the tone and anchors the relationship.
template:
Hi {{guestName}},

Thanks for booking {{propertyName}} for {{nights}} night{{plural}} starting {{checkInDate}}. Your reservation is confirmed.

I'll send full check-in instructions a few days before arrival. In the meantime, if you have questions about the area or anything else, just reply here.

Looking forward to hosting you,
{{hostName}}

shortDescription: Crisp, professional confirmation for business stays.
whenToUse: When the guest profile or booking details signal business travel.
template:
Hi {{guestName}},

Your booking for {{propertyName}} ({{checkInDate}}–{{checkOutDate}}) is confirmed.

Key details:
• High-speed Wi-Fi: yes
• Workspace: yes
• Self check-in: yes
• Receipts available on request

Full check-in instructions arrive 48 hours before arrival.

Best,
{{hostName}}

shortDescription: Confirmation tailored for families with children.
whenToUse: When guest count includes minors or 'family' is mentioned in the booking.
template:
Hi {{guestName}},

Thanks for booking {{propertyName}} for your family. Confirmed for {{checkInDate}} to {{checkOutDate}}.

Kid-friendly notes:
• Pack-and-play and high chair available
• Outlet covers and stair gates installed
• Park within walking distance

Let me know ages of the kids and I'll have anything specific ready for you.

Warmly,
{{hostName}}

shortDescription: Confirms pet booking and sets pet ground rules.
whenToUse: When pet fee was paid or the listing is pet-friendly and the guest indicated a pet.
template:
Hi {{guestName}},

Glad to host you and {{petName}}. Confirmed for {{checkInDate}}–{{checkOutDate}}.

Pet notes:
• Bowls and a bed are in the kitchen cabinet
• Fenced backyard
• Pet relief area is the grass strip past the driveway
• No pets on the upstairs sofa, please

Send a pic of {{petName}} when you arrive — always love seeing who's stayed.

{{hostName}}

shortDescription: Long-term booking confirmation with logistics.
whenToUse: Bookings 28 nights or longer. Cover mid-stay logistics upfront.
template:
Hi {{guestName}},

Your {{nights}}-night stay at {{propertyName}} ({{checkInDate}}–{{checkOutDate}}) is confirmed.

For longer stays, here's what's worth knowing:
• Cleaning: bi-weekly, scheduled with you in advance
• Trash pickup: {{trashDay}}
• Mail: deliveries okay, kitchen counter is the drop spot
• Utilities: included

I'll send the full guidebook closer to arrival. Reply here with anything you need to plan around.

{{hostName}}

shortDescription: Final reminder with door code and timing.
primaryKeyword: airbnb day of check in message
whenToUse: Send morning of check-in. Last touchpoint before arrival.

shortDescription: Standard 3-day-out arrival info packet.
whenToUse: Default 3-day-out touchpoint with full check-in details.

shortDescription: Local weather warning before guest arrives.
whenToUse: When notable weather is in the forecast — heat wave, cold snap, storm.

shortDescription: Soft ask for arrival time and preferences.
whenToUse: When you want to confirm logistics without being pushy.
template:
Hi {{guestName}},

Looking forward to hosting you. A couple of quick questions to make your arrival smooth:

1. Roughly what time do you expect to arrive?
2. Anything I should have ready (early check-in, late check-in, accessibility)?
3. Any food allergies if I'm leaving snacks?

No rush — reply when you can.

{{hostName}}

shortDescription: Sends curated picks before guest plans the trip.
whenToUse: 5–7 days out, when guests are starting to plan their itinerary.

shortDescription: Confirms an early check-in request.
whenToUse: Guest asked for early check-in and the property is ready.
template:
Hi {{guestName}},

Good news — the place will be ready earlier than usual. You can check in any time after {{earlyCheckInTime}} on {{checkInDate}}.

Door code and Wi-Fi info are in the message I sent earlier. Travel safe.

{{hostName}}

shortDescription: Polite decline of early check-in request.
primaryKeyword: airbnb early check in denied template
whenToUse: Guest asked for early check-in but the property won't be ready.
template:
Hi {{guestName}},

I know the timing's not what you were hoping for. Cleaning runs right up to {{checkInTime}} on your day, so I'm not able to offer earlier check-in.

A couple of options:
• Drop bags by the side gate (covered, secure)
• Park in the driveway and grab coffee at {{coffeePick}} until check-in opens

Let me know what works.

{{hostName}}

shortDescription: Acknowledges a late arrival and reassures.
whenToUse: Guest will arrive after dark or late evening.
template:
Hi {{guestName}},

No problem on the late arrival. The exterior light stays on, and the door code works any time. If the timing changes again, just text — no apology needed.

Drive safe.

{{hostName}}

shortDescription: Shares airport-to-property logistics.
whenToUse: Property is near a major airport and guest is flying in.
template:
Hi {{guestName}},

For getting from {{airport}} to the property:

• Rideshare: ~{{rideshareCost}}, ~{{rideshareMinutes}} minutes
• Rental car: easiest if you'll be exploring beyond walking distance
• Public transit: {{transitNote}}

Driveway parking is free for guests if you do go with a rental.

{{hostName}}

shortDescription: Acknowledge anniversary, birthday, honeymoon.
whenToUse: Booking notes mentioned a special occasion.
template:
Hi {{guestName}},

Congrats on the {{occasion}}. Want me to leave anything special — flowers, a bottle of wine, a handwritten note?

There are a few local florists I trust if you'd like a recommendation.

Looking forward to hosting you both,
{{hostName}}

shortDescription: Light-touch follow-up to surface issues early.
primaryKeyword: airbnb mid stay check in template
whenToUse: Send 24–36 hours after check-in. Catches problems before they become reviews.
template:
Hi {{guestName}},

Just a quick check-in — settled in alright? Anything not working as expected, or anything missing that would make the stay better?

Happy with a thumbs-up if everything's fine. Otherwise reply here and I'll handle it.

{{hostName}}

shortDescription: Standard reply to 'where is the X?' message.
whenToUse: Guest asks where to find an amenity — coffee, towels, etc.

shortDescription: Acknowledge and resolve a maintenance issue.
whenToUse: Guest reports something not working in the property.

shortDescription: Address external noise concern with empathy.
whenToUse: Guest complains about external noise (neighbors, construction).
template:
Hi {{guestName}},

Sorry the noise is disrupting the stay. Things I can try right now:

• A pair of earplugs in the bathroom drawer
• White-noise app suggestions if you don't have one
• {{specificAction}}

If it's truly unworkable, let me know and we'll figure out a fair adjustment.

{{hostName}}

shortDescription: Yes to late checkout request.
whenToUse: Guest asked for late checkout and you can accommodate.
template:
Hi {{guestName}},

Yep, late checkout works. You can stay until {{lateCheckOutTime}} on {{checkOutDate}}.

No other changes — just lock up when you head out.

{{hostName}}

shortDescription: Polite no to late checkout, with reason.
whenToUse: Guest asked for late checkout but the property turns over same-day.
template:
Hi {{guestName}},

Unfortunately I have a same-day turnover and the cleaning team needs the full window. Standard checkout at {{checkOutTime}} on {{checkOutDate}} stands.

Happy to suggest a coffee shop with Wi-Fi if you have time to kill before your travel home.

{{hostName}}

shortDescription: Approve or quote an extension request.
whenToUse: Guest asks to add nights mid-stay.

shortDescription: First-touch nudge on a rule issue.
whenToUse: Minor rule violation observed (smell of smoke, extra guests, parking).
template:
Hi {{guestName}},

Quick note — {{violationDetail}}. House rules are pretty clear on this, and I want to flag it before it becomes a bigger deal.

Let's get back on track for the rest of your stay. Reply here if there's context I'm missing.

{{hostName}}

shortDescription: Standard thank-you after departure.
primaryKeyword: airbnb thank you message after stay
whenToUse: Send within 12 hours of checkout. Sets tone for review exchange.
template:
Hi {{guestName}},

Thanks for staying at {{propertyName}} — hope the trip wrapped up well. Easy to host you, and you're welcome back any time.

If you have a minute to leave a review, I'd really appreciate it.

{{hostName}}

shortDescription: Direct request for a review.
whenToUse: Send 24–48 hours after checkout if no review yet.
template:
Hi {{guestName}},

Quick ask — if you have a moment to leave a review for the stay, it makes a big difference for the listing. Even a sentence helps.

Thanks for being a great guest,
{{hostName}}

shortDescription: Quick thank-you for a good review.
primaryKeyword: airbnb thank you for review template
whenToUse: Reply when guest leaves a 5-star review with kind comments.

shortDescription: Soft pitch to return during slow season.
whenToUse: When you have open dates and want to invite a past guest back.
template:
Hi {{guestName}},

Hope all's well. Wanted to flag that {{offSeasonName}} is opening up at {{propertyName}} — {{offSeasonNote}}.

If you'd like to come back, reply with your dates and I'll send a direct discount.

{{hostName}}

scenario: Lost item — guest message to host
shortDescription: Guest left something behind, asking host.
Confirms item was found, sets shipping plan.
whenToUse: Guest reports lost item; you found it.
template:
Hi {{guestName}},

Good news — found the {{item}}. Cleaning team turned it up in {{whereFound}}.

I'll ship it to the address you sent. Cost will be {{shipCost}}; want me to invoice you through the platform or send a payment link?

{{hostName}}

shortDescription: Honest follow-up when item wasn't found.
primaryKeyword: airbnb lost item not found response
whenToUse: Guest reports lost item; cleaning team didn't find it.
template:
Hi {{guestName}},

Sorry, the team didn't turn up {{item}} during turnover. I'll keep an eye out and have the next cleaner check {{whereToCheckAgain}} — sometimes things surface a stay later.

I'll message back if it shows up.

{{hostName}}

scenario: Late checkout request — guest to host
shortDescription: Polite ask for late checkout.
whenToUse: Guest needs an extra hour or two before flight/drive home.
template:
Hi {{hostName}},

Would a {{lateCheckOutTime}} checkout be possible on {{checkOutDate}}? My {{reason}} doesn't leave until {{departureTime}}, and a couple of extra hours at the place would make a real difference.

Understand if it doesn't work — just thought I'd ask.

Thanks,
{{guestName}}

shortDescription: Firm message after a noise issue.
whenToUse: Neighbor complaint or noise monitoring triggered.
template:
Hi {{guestName}},

I got a complaint about noise from the property at {{noiseTime}} last night. Quiet hours are {{quietHours}} per the house rules.

Let's keep the rest of the stay friendly with the neighbors. Reply here if there's something I should know.

{{hostName}}

shortDescription: Request reimbursement for broken item.
whenToUse: Cleaning crew documented damage post-stay.
template:
Hi {{guestName}},

During turnover, the team found {{damageDetail}}. The replacement cost is {{replacementCost}}.

I'm filing a request through the Resolution Center. If there's context I should know, reply here first and we can talk it through.

{{hostName}}

shortDescription: Polite refund request after issue.
whenToUse: Guest experienced an issue and wants partial refund.

shortDescription: Polite no to refund request, with reasoning.
whenToUse: Guest asked for refund you don't believe is warranted.

shortDescription: Cancel a confirmed booking due to emergency.
whenToUse: Genuine emergency forces a host-side cancellation.
template:
Hi {{guestName}},

I'm so sorry — I have to cancel your booking at {{propertyName}} due to {{reason}}. I know this is the last thing you want to hear right now.

I'm processing a full refund through Airbnb today. If you want, I can also help with finding alternatives in the area — happy to suggest a few hosts I trust.

{{hostName}}

shortDescription: Address unregistered guests.
whenToUse: Camera/visit shows more guests than booked.
template:
Hi {{guestName}},

The booking is for {{bookedGuests}} guest{{plural}}, but it looks like {{actualGuests}} are at the property. The listing's max-guest count is enforced through Airbnb for insurance reasons.

If the count's wrong, please update through Airbnb so the additional fee + insurance line up. Otherwise extra guests need to leave by tonight.

{{hostName}}

shortDescription: Pet observed when listing is no-pet.
whenToUse: Pet policy violated.
template:
Hi {{guestName}},

The listing is no-pets, but it looks like {{petDetail}}. This matters because of {{reasonImportant}}.

I need {{remedy}} by today. If there's something I should know, reply here.

{{hostName}}

shortDescription: Address evidence of indoor smoking.
whenToUse: Smoke smell, ashes, or visible evidence of smoking inside.
template:
Hi {{guestName}},

The property is non-smoking, including all interior spaces. The {{evidence}} is a clear violation.

For the rest of your stay, smoking only outside, please. I'll also be assessing a deep-cleaning fee of {{cleaningFee}} after checkout to address the smoke smell.

{{hostName}}

shortDescription: Stop a party in progress.
whenToUse: Active party detected via noise/cameras/neighbors.
template:
{{guestName}},

This is a no-party listing, and what's happening tonight crosses that line. Music down, extra people out, and the noise wrapped within 30 minutes.

If this continues I'll need to involve Airbnb Resolution and may end the stay. I'd rather not — let's get this back in line tonight.

{{hostName}}

shortDescription: Locked out, asking host for help.
whenToUse: Guest is locked out and needs immediate help.
template:
Hi {{hostName}},

Locked out at the moment. The {{lockType}} {{whatHappened}}.

Any way to get me back in tonight? I'm at {{currentLocation}}.

Thanks,
{{guestName}}

shortDescription: Coordinate getting guest back in.
whenToUse: Guest is locked out and you need to help fast.
template:
Hi {{guestName}},

On it. Two options:

1. Backup code is {{backupCode}} — try that first, sometimes the main keypad needs a reset.
2. If that fails, reply here and I'll {{escalation}} within the next 30 minutes.

Hang tight.

{{hostName}}

shortDescription: Acknowledge and resolve hot water issue.
whenToUse: Guest reports no hot water.

shortDescription: Address AC failure during a heat wave.
whenToUse: AC stops working during the stay.
template:
Hi {{guestName}},

Sorry — that's the last thing you want this time of year. I'm calling HVAC now.

In the meantime, two portable fans are in {{fanLocation}}. If the AC isn't fixed by {{deadline}}, I'll {{compensation}}.

{{hostName}}

shortDescription: Acknowledge cleaning issue, fix fast.
whenToUse: Guest reports the property wasn't cleaned properly.
template:
Hi {{guestName}},

That's not the standard. I'm sending the cleaner back this afternoon at {{returnTime}} — please leave the place open if you can, or let me know a window that works.

I'm also refunding {{refundAmount}} as a make-good for the rough start.

{{hostName}}

shortDescription: Address bug sighting urgently.
whenToUse: Guest reports bugs, mice, or other pests.
template:
Hi {{guestName}},

That's not okay — sorry about it. Pest control is being dispatched today. Can you share a photo so I can pass exact details to them?

If the place is unworkable, reply here and we'll talk through alternatives or compensation.

{{hostName}}

shortDescription: Reset and escalate Wi-Fi outage.
whenToUse: Guest reports Wi-Fi not working.
template:
Hi {{guestName}},

Ouch — for a working stay that's a real problem. Quick test:

1. Power-cycle the router (small white box, {{routerLocation}}). Unplug 30 seconds, plug back in.
2. The network should come back as {{wifiSsid}}.

If that doesn't fix it within 10 minutes, I'll call the ISP. {{compensation}}.

{{hostName}}

shortDescription: Pass along a neighbor's concern diplomatically.
whenToUse: Neighbor reaches out about the guest.
template:
Hi {{guestName}},

A neighbor reached out about {{complaintDetail}}. Could just be a misunderstanding — wanted to flag it before it grows.

Let's keep the rest of the stay easy on the surrounding folks. Reply if there's something I'm missing.

{{hostName}}

scenario: Public response to a bad review
shortDescription: Professional response to negative review.
whenToUse: Guest left a 1- or 2-star review you want to address publicly.

shortDescription: Concise claim narrative for the Resolution Center.
whenToUse: Filing a damage claim through the Resolution Center.

shortDescription: Documented narrative for AirCover claim.
whenToUse: Filing through AirCover for damage above standard rates.

shortDescription: Recover from a calendar mistake.
whenToUse: Calendar error created a double booking.
template:
Hi {{guestName}},

This is on me — a calendar error created a double booking for your dates. I'm so sorry to deliver that news.

What I can do right now:

• Full refund processed today
• Help finding a comparable stay nearby (I have a list of hosts I trust)
• {{additionalGesture}}

Reply with what would help most.

{{hostName}}

shortDescription: Address a chargeback notification.
whenToUse: Notified of a chargeback or payment dispute.
template:
Hi {{guestName}},

I was notified of a payment dispute for reservation {{reservationCode}}. I'd like to understand what's happening before this escalates.

My records show {{recordSummary}}. If there's something I missed, reply here in the next 48 hours and we'll work through it.

{{hostName}}

shortDescription: Public reply to a glowing review.
whenToUse: Public reply on a 5-star review.
template: Thanks {{guestName}} — really appreciate the kind words. Easy stay, and you're welcome back any time.

shortDescription: Acknowledge feedback in a 4-star public reply.
whenToUse: Public reply on a 4-star review.
template: Thanks for the review, {{guestName}}. Appreciate the {{positiveAspect}} note. {{addressedConcern}} Hope to host you again.

shortDescription: Professional acknowledgement of a mid review.
whenToUse: Public reply on a 3-star review.
template: Thanks for the feedback, {{guestName}}. Sorry the stay didn't fully land. {{specificResponse}} We've already {{remediationStep}}. Appreciate the time to share.

shortDescription: Composed public reply to a 1- or 2-star review.
whenToUse: Public reply on a 1- or 2-star review.

scenario: Host leaves a positive guest review
shortDescription: Standard 5-star review of a guest.
primaryKeyword: airbnb host review of guest template
whenToUse: Leaving a public review for a great guest.
template: {{guestName}} was a {{positiveDescriptor}} guest — communicated clearly, respected the house, left the place in great shape. Welcome back any time.

scenario: Host leaves a neutral guest review
shortDescription: Brief, neutral guest review.
whenToUse: Guest stay was fine but unmemorable.
template: {{guestName}} stayed at the property and communicated as needed.

scenario: Host leaves a negative guest review
shortDescription: Honest negative review of a problem guest.
whenToUse: Public review for a guest with rule violations or damage.
template: {{guestName}} {{specificIssue}}. Documented and reported through Resolution Center. Wouldn't host again.

shortDescription: Internal: cleaner restock checklist.
whenToUse: Briefing the cleaner before a turnover.

scenario: Co-host handoff for an arriving guest
shortDescription: Brief co-host on a specific arrival.
whenToUse: Co-host is covering a check-in.

scenario: Guest injured at property — host response
shortDescription: Empathetic, careful response to an injury report.
whenToUse: Guest reports an injury at the property.
template:
Hi {{guestName}},

So sorry to hear that — first, are you okay right now?

Closest urgent care is {{urgentCareName}} at {{urgentCareAddress}}, ER is {{erAddress}}.

When you have a moment, please let me know what happened so I can document it and check the property. Health and safety first; logistics after.

{{hostName}}

shortDescription: Acknowledge area-wide outage.
whenToUse: Power's out, no immediate fix.
template:
Hi {{guestName}},

The outage is area-wide — utility ETA is {{utilityEta}}. Flashlights are in {{flashlightLocation}}.

If the timing pushes past tonight, I'll {{contingencyPlan}}. Hang tight.

{{hostName}}

shortDescription: Triage a water leak with the guest.
whenToUse: Guest reports water leak inside the property.
template:
Hi {{guestName}},

Thanks for the heads-up. Quick triage:

1. Main shutoff is {{shutoffLocation}}. Please turn it off if water's actively flowing.
2. Towels are in {{towelLocation}}.
3. Plumber is being called now — ETA {{plumberEta}}.

Reply with photos if you can. Will adjust the rate to make this right.

{{hostName}}

scenario: Fire/smoke alarm going off — host response
shortDescription: Steady response to a fire alarm.
whenToUse: Guest reports a fire/smoke alarm without an actual fire.
template:
Hi {{guestName}},

If there's any chance of real smoke or fire — get out now and call 911. Don't reply until you're outside.

If it's a false alarm: {{resetSteps}}. Battery in the kitchen alarm gets cranky every few months.

Text me once it's quiet.

{{hostName}}

shortDescription: Tell guest not to worry about a broken glass.
whenToUse: Guest apologizes for breaking small glassware.

shortDescription: Document and report missing item.
whenToUse: Cleaner found item missing post-stay.
template:
Hi {{guestName}},

The {{item}} is missing after your stay. Want to give you a chance to clarify before I file a Resolution Center claim.

Reply within 24 hours with anything I should know. Otherwise I'll proceed with the formal claim.

{{hostName}}

shortDescription: Ask guest for photo of damage before claim.
whenToUse: Guest reports damage; you want documentation before responding.
template:
Hi {{guestName}},

Thanks for flagging. Before I figure out next steps, could you send a photo or two of the damage? Helps me brief the right person.

No rush — within today is fine.

{{hostName}}

scenario: Thanks for review + asks for recommendations
shortDescription: Combine thanks with a soft pitch for referrals.
whenToUse: After a glowing review, when you want word-of-mouth.
template:
Hi {{guestName}},

Really appreciate the kind review — it makes a real difference for the listing. If friends or family are headed to {{city}}, sending them my way means a lot. Happy to set up a {{referralPerk}} for anyone you send.

Thanks again,
{{hostName}}

shortDescription: Ask 2 short questions after departure.
whenToUse: When you want feedback before they write a review.
template:
Hi {{guestName}},

Quick 2-question check before you head off:

1. What worked well?
2. What would have made the stay better?

Replies stay private. Thanks for the time.

{{hostName}}

shortDescription: Reach out to a family with a newborn.
whenToUse: Guest mentioned traveling with infant.
template:
Hi {{guestName}},

So glad to host you all. Quick note for traveling with a newborn:

• Pack-and-play is set up in the second bedroom
• Bottle warmer + sterilizer in the kitchen drawer (left of the sink)
• Blackout curtains in both bedrooms
• 24-hour pharmacy is {{pharmacyName}}, 5 minutes

Let me know if there's anything specific I can have ready.

{{hostName}}

shortDescription: Address mobility or accessibility needs upfront.
whenToUse: Guest indicated accessibility needs.

shortDescription: Friendly low-jargon arrival message.
whenToUse: Guest is from a country where English isn't primary.

shortDescription: Open an empathetic conversation when guest seems unhappy.
whenToUse: Tone of guest messages signals dissatisfaction without specific complaint.
template:
Hi {{guestName}},

Reading between the lines, it feels like the stay isn't meeting expectations. Want to make it right.

What's not working — and what would make this better? No bad answers.

{{hostName}}

shortDescription: Confirm whether the booker matches the actual guest.
whenToUse: You suspect the booker isn't the actual guest.
template:
Hi {{guestName}},

Quick verification — Airbnb requires that the person who booked is the person who stays at the property. Just confirming you're the one staying for {{checkInDate}}–{{checkOutDate}}?

Not a hassle, just need this confirmed before check-in.

{{hostName}}

shortDescription: Address aromatic cooking diplomatically.
whenToUse: Lingering cooking smells affecting next-stay turnover.
template:
Hi {{guestName}},

Not a rule violation, just a heads-up — cooking with strong spices can take a few extra cleaning passes between guests. Range hood is on a switch at the wall by the stove; running it while cooking helps a lot.

No charges, just a tip for the rest of the stay.

{{hostName}}

shortDescription: Light check-in to a guest who hasn't arrived.
whenToUse: Guest hasn't arrived hours after check-in time.

shortDescription: Offer a return guest a private discount.
whenToUse: Past guest stayed >2 times.
template:
Hi {{guestName}},

Since you've stayed at {{propertyName}} {{stayCount}} times now, sending over a {{discountAmount}} off any future stay. Just message me before you book and I'll send a special offer link.

Thanks for being a great repeat guest.

{{hostName}}

shortDescription: Ask for specific cleaning feedback to improve.
whenToUse: Improving cleaning quality from real guest input.
template:
Hi {{guestName}},

Quick ask — was anything off about cleanliness during the stay? Honest feedback (good or bad) helps me brief the cleaning team.

Thanks,
{{hostName}}

shortDescription: Quick ask for arrival time.
whenToUse: 1–2 days out, you need a tighter arrival window.

shortDescription: Mention grocery delivery for first morning.
whenToUse: Property has grocery-delivery options available.

shortDescription: Acknowledge a listed-but-missing amenity.
whenToUse: Guest reports a listed amenity is missing or broken.
template:
Hi {{guestName}},

Sorry — {{amenity}} should have been ready and isn't. Two options:

1. I can {{deliveryOption}} within {{deliveryWindow}}.
2. If that doesn't work, {{compensation}}.

Which works for you?

{{hostName}}

shortDescription: Friendly nudge about overflowing trash.
whenToUse: Trash is overflowing visibly during stay.

shortDescription: Verify physical key return.
whenToUse: Property uses physical keys.

shortDescription: Charge for unauthorized late checkout.
whenToUse: Guest stayed past checkout without permission.
template:
Hi {{guestName}},

Noting that checkout ran {{minutesLate}} minutes past the scheduled time. The same-day cleaner had to wait, so I'm assessing a {{lateFee}} fee per the listing.

No other issues — just covering the cleaning team's time.

{{hostName}}

shortDescription: Verify ID matches the booking profile.
whenToUse: ID doesn't match booking name.
template:
Hi {{guestName}},

Quick verification — the name on the booking is {{bookedName}}, but the ID I've seen says {{idName}}. Probably a simple mix-up; just want to confirm before check-in.

Reply here, or update through Airbnb if it's a maiden/legal-name thing.

{{hostName}}

scenario: Recovery message after a rough stay
shortDescription: Offer a private recovery before review window closes.
whenToUse: Stay had issues; you want to land a fair review.
template:
Hi {{guestName}},

Replaying the stay — I know the {{issue}} was a real miss. I'd like to make it right.

Open to {{offer}}, or whatever feels fair from your end. Means a lot to learn from this one before the review window closes.

{{hostName}}

shortDescription: Heads-up before a storm or major weather event.
whenToUse: Severe weather is in the forecast.

shortDescription: Check whether your tip landed.
whenToUse: After sending recommendations earlier in the stay.

scenario: Guest sends a tip via Resolution Center
shortDescription: Guest message to host about tipping cleaner.
whenToUse: Guest wants to tip the cleaner directly.
template:
Hi {{hostName}},

Loved the stay — would like to tip the cleaning team {{tipAmount}}. Send a Resolution Center request and I'll approve it right away.

Thanks for everything,
{{guestName}}

shortDescription: Escalate after a second rule violation.
whenToUse: Same rule violated twice.
template:
{{guestName}},

This is the second time I've raised {{violation}}. House rules are clear, and at this point I need to involve Airbnb if it happens again.

Let's not get there. I'd rather end the stay on good terms — please {{specificAction}}.

{{hostName}}

shortDescription: Notice ending a stay early due to violations.
whenToUse: Multiple severe violations require ending the stay.
template:
{{guestName}},

Given {{repeatedViolation}}, I'm ending the booking effective {{terminationTime}}. I've contacted Airbnb, and the resolution is being processed on their side.

Please have everyone out by {{terminationTime}}. The property must be left in standard condition.

{{hostName}}

shortDescription: Ask permission to use a guest's photo.
whenToUse: Guest posted a great photo of your property.

shortDescription: Address a specific low rating in the review reply.
whenToUse: Guest left specific cleanliness feedback in a review.
template: Thanks for raising this, {{guestName}}. {{specificAcknowledgement}} The cleaning team has been briefed and we've added {{remediationStep}} to the turnover checklist. Appreciate the time to share.

shortDescription: Address a low listing-accuracy rating publicly.
whenToUse: Review flagged something inaccurate in the listing.
template: Thanks {{guestName}}. {{specificDiscrepancy}} I've updated the listing to reflect this — appreciate you flagging it.

shortDescription: Check on guests during a major snowstorm.
whenToUse: Major snow event, ensuring guest safety.
template:
Hi {{guestName}},

Snow's coming in heavy tonight. Quick safety check:

• Heat working?
• Enough food/water for 24 hours?
• Emergency contact saved? {{emergencyContact}}

Reply when you can. Stay warm.

{{hostName}}

shortDescription: Inform guests of mandatory evacuation.
whenToUse: Mandatory evacuation order issued.
template:
{{guestName}},

Mandatory evacuation has been issued for the area effective {{evacTime}}. You'll need to leave the property by then.

Airbnb's Extenuating Circumstances policy applies — full refund will be processed. I'll handle the request on my end.

Closest safe route: {{routeDirection}}.

Stay safe,
{{hostName}}

shortDescription: Ask cleaning-specific feedback before review.
whenToUse: Want to surface cleanliness issues privately first.

shortDescription: Confirm self-check-in works in advance.
whenToUse: Property uses self-check-in.

shortDescription: Politely decline an unjustified discount request.
whenToUse: Guest asks for discount without specific issue.
template:
Hi {{guestName}},

Appreciate you asking. Pricing is locked in at the listing rate, and I'm not able to discount post-booking without a specific issue I can address.

If there's something specific I should know, reply here and I'll work through it.

{{hostName}}

shortDescription: Personal hand-written follow-up.
whenToUse: After a perfect stay with a wonderful guest.
template:
Hi {{guestName}},

Not every guest leaves a place feeling like nothing happened. {{specificCompliment}}. Means a lot.

Door's open whenever you find yourself back in {{city}}.

{{hostName}}

shortDescription: Address a guest photo that misrepresents property.
whenToUse: Guest review photo shows damage you weren't aware of.

scenario: Mention recent improvement in review reply
shortDescription: Use review reply to highlight recent improvements.
whenToUse: Public review reply where you can mention an upgrade.
template: Thanks {{guestName}}. Glad the {{positiveAspect}} landed. Worth mentioning — we just added {{recentImprovement}} based on past feedback. Welcome back any time.

shortDescription: Snow sports specific arrival info.
whenToUse: Property is near ski/snowboard areas.

shortDescription: Beach-specific arrival info.
whenToUse: Coastal/beach property.

shortDescription: Notify guest of pre-arrival property problem.
whenToUse: Issue discovered between bookings, before guest arrives.
template:
Hi {{guestName}},

Getting in touch to flag something before your arrival on {{checkInDate}}: {{issueDetail}}.

Here's what I'm doing about it: {{remediationPlan}}.

If that's not workable for your trip, reply here and we'll figure out next steps together — full refund + alternate-stay help on the table.

{{hostName}}

shortDescription: Send formal stay receipt for expenses.
whenToUse: Business traveler asks for receipt.
template:
Hi {{guestName}},

Attached the receipt for your stay at {{propertyName}} ({{checkInDate}}–{{checkOutDate}}).

If you need a different format for your expense report, let me know — happy to reformat.

{{hostName}}

shortDescription: Acknowledge superhost compliment.
whenToUse: Review specifically mentioned hospitality.
template: Thanks {{guestName}}. The kind words on hospitality mean a lot — that's the bar I'm aiming for. Welcome back any time.
